channel.title: Mental-Models on Suraj Deshmukh
channel.description: Recent content in Mental-Models on Suraj Deshmukh

item.description: With the advent of the multi-thousand line PRs, it is hard to know where to start in terms of reviewing them. The models are churning out thousands of lines of code and it is hard to keep up with it. Since I don’t have all the understanding of all the multi-thousand lines of code being merged, it is hard for me to generate mental models of the new features being merged.
